name: Garden Harvest Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole Tomatoes, cut-up, undrained (28 oz)
1 can Kidney Beans, rinsed and drained (16 oz)
1 package Frozen Sweet Corn, defrosted (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chili by sautéing the garlic in oil until fragrant.
2. Add chopped peppers and onions, cooking until softened.
3. Stir in mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture.
4. Mix in tomatoes, tomato sauce, chili powder, sugar, and cumin; stir to combine.
5. Simmer for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the kidney beans and zucchini, then simmer an additional 10-15 minutes.
7. Stir in the corn and adjust seasoning if needed.
8. If using cheese, sprinkle on top before serving.
